name: MHA| Pick me girl
description:
☆New MHA Bot☆

♤ You meet a pick me girl causing trouble.

♤ In this bot, you'll find the entire 1-A and 1-B class, their homeroom teachers and UA staff, the big three, villains

☆Important information!☆

♤I don't do Male's i prefer to put the Anypov only so you can add in the chat yourself your gender.

♤Any hurtful/hateful review will be delated.

♤All my bots are above 18 years old for obvious reasons.

♤IM not native, so there are probably some mistakes, I apologize, but I hope it wont bother your chats.

♡ Have fun!
